title: Files Column - Drag file onto desktop folder - UX request
excerpt: Hi there, we use a board as a file store for latest template files - it would be great to just be able to drag the file icon out of the file column to the relevant folder on the desktop and the file automatically downloa…

posts.author: nikkennedy (Nik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, we use a board as a file store for latest template files - it would be great to just be able to drag the file icon out of the file column to the relevant folder on the desktop and the file automatically downloads the latest version to the folder rather than clicking download, downloading to the browswers download folder and then copying it over.

Is this possible?
